reviews.comment:
En todas las estaciones de servicio haces fila pero lo peor si vas de noche ahy un solo payero,y si vas antes de 23hs eso va rápido

At every gas station you have to queue, but the worst part is if you go at night there's only one attendant, and if you go before 11 pm it moves quickly
